description: CompositionYellow round neck t-shirt made of 60% cotton and 40% polyester, with short sleeves and shiny print on the chestFittingComfortWash care Machine wash warm Wash with like colours only Use only non-chlorine bleach when needed Tumble dry low Do not iron if decorated Do not dry clean if decorated Get ready to feel like a Kryptonian yourself with this yellow superman t-shirt from free authority. Featuring the superman emblem on the chest, this tee has all that one needs to feel powerful. Pair it with sneakers and light denims for that stylish look.Model statisticsThe model wears size M in t-shirtsHeight-6; Shoulders-19"
